name: xcode
description: GUI-first Xcode.app automation for Codex, with plugin-routed CLI support for builds, simulators, results, diagnostics, and native Xcode state sensing.

interface.shortDescription: Control Xcode.app through the GUI first, with plugin-routed CLI support when needed
interface.longDescription: GUI-first Xcode workflows for Codex. On first use, or whenever the mcp__xcode__* namespace is missing, agents must run the one-action bootstrap command bin/xcode mcp bootstrap --json, then restart Codex if the local smoke checks pass. When this plugin is explicitly mentioned, agents should control the open Xcode.app window through callable MCP tools or bin/xcode ide/native commands before using command-line validation. The stable bin/xcode dispatcher also provides shared-cache xcodebuild validation, simulator lifecycle commands, xcresulttool summaries, warning parsing, read-only context inspection, packaging validation, and environment diagnostics. Bare xcodebuild, simctl, xcresulttool, osascript, open -a Xcode, XcodeBuildMCP, and old xcode-cli-shared-cache-build usage should be avoided; the plugin dispatcher owns those paths. If first-use MCP bootstrap still fails after repair, agents must report it at https://github.com/AmrMohamad/Xcoder/issues with compact redacted diagnostics. The plugin does not depend on XcodeBuildMCP, and Apple's mcpbridge is treated as optional.
defaultPrompt: Control the open Xcode window and run the selected scheme through the GUI
Bootstrap the bundled Xcoder Swift MCP server and verify mcp__xcode__* tools
Use Xcode.app GUI automation to build or test this project
